tool_calls: cd /home/eval && if [ -f /data/poem.txt ]; then cat /data/poem.txt; else echo no; fi
tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' < /data/poem.txt | grep -oE "[[:alpha:]']+" | sort | uniq -c | sort -k1,1nr -k2,2 | head -3 | awk '{print $2, $1}'

tool_outputs.commands: cd /home/eval && if [ -f /data/poem.txt ]; then cat /data/poem.txt; else echo no; fi
tool_outputs.stderr: cd: /home/eval: No such file or directory

tool_outputs.commands: tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' < /data/poem.txt | grep -oE "[[:alpha:]']+" | sort | uniq -c | sort -k1,1nr -k2,2 | head -3 | awk '{print $2, $1}'
